chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 415 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.3361/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.3362/2021 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on MA No.3363/2021 (Stay/A) 28-06-2021 Mr. Abdul Raheem Ansari, Advocate for applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 5. Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions from his client, does not press the present Criminal Miscellaneous Application, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn along with the listed applications. J U D G E Abdul Basit
